This '''unidentified [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]''' served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|general]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Taking part in the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], they led units of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] into battle alongside fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], [[Rivi-Anu]], and [[Eon]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], this [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] fought alongside the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During battle on an unknown [[Planet/Legends|planet]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], they were assigned to a battlefront under the leadership of Councilor [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. Joined by recently knighted [[Rivi-Anu]] and [[Eon]], the group fought valiantly to repel the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. When a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] plummeted toward the battlefield, they all believed they would die, until Rivi-Anu [[Telekinesis/Legends|held back]] the warship with an astounding display of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Rivi-Anu waited until all Jedi and clones had fled the field, including this Jedi, and then allowed the ship to crash down upon herself.<ref name="TTVP" />
